title: hieracium atratum subsp. tanylepis
intro: Hieracium atratum subsp. tanylepis, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium atratum subsp. tanylepis include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, and it has also been used to treat various skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
